title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 407.200 - Unsolicited merchandise, how disposed of
text:
407.200.  Unsolicited merchandise, how disposed of. — Where unsolicited merchandise is delivered to a person for whom it is intended, such person has a right to refuse to accept delivery of this merchandise or he may deem it to be a gift and use it or dispose of it in any manner without any obligation to the sender.
(L. 1969 S.B. 20 § 1)
